title: DJED Goes Open Source, Unlocking the Path to the World’s First Multi
summary: At Rare Evo, COTI proudly unveiled the next evolution of DJED, the algorithmic stablecoin built on Cardano. DJED was pioneered...
cleanedContent:
DJED Goes Open Source, Unlocking the Path to the World’s First Multi-Chain Private Stablecoin

COTI | Aug 8, 2025

At Rare Evo, COTI proudly unveiled the next evolution of DJED, the algorithmic stablecoin built on Cardano. DJED was pioneered by COTI and IOG in 2023 and has proven itself as one of the most resilient stablecoins in the space.

Now, it’s introducing three major developments that mark DJED’s transformation into a new kind of digital asset that ushers in a new class of use cases, strengthening its long-term position as a core infrastructure for Web3.

DJED Gets Powerful Open Source Features

DJED has consistently held its peg since inception, outperforming its peers and making it the most robust stablecoin on the market. Now, COTI is open-sourcing key parts of the Djed infrastructure (order API, chain indexer, frontend) to empower developers and communities to build around it.

Developers will be able to:

  • Build custom frontends for DJED
  • Integrate DJED functionality into wallets or dApps
  • Run backend services to interact securely with it

IOG stated: “Open-sourcing DJED gives Cardano developers the ability to inspect, extend, and build directly on the protocol, with transparency, driving faster innovation and deeper trust. This is a complex system engineered for uniquely high assurance: it’s grounded in formal methods, backed by very thorough testing, and has been running reliably on mainnet for 2.5 years.”

Private DJED: Privacy-Preserving Stablecoin for Cardano, COTI, and Midnight

COTI will also introduce Private DJED, the first enterprise-ready, private stablecoin to launch across multiple chains.

DJED On COTI

With the open sourcing of DJED, COTI will introduce a wrapped version of DJED into its own blockchain infrastructure.

COTI is a powerful home for Private DJED and a game-changer for enterprises, institutions, and privacy-conscious users. Not only will users be able to send, receive, and interact with it confidentially, but COTI’s capabilities extend the ability of Private DJED to be used within more complex dApps and DeFi flows. Private DJED is suitable for fully private DeFi, supply chain finance, enterprise, RWA markets, and many more use-cases.

COTI’s privacy layer, powered by garbled circuits, enables fast, light, and scalable privacy that will turn DJED into a privacy-first financial primitive that can operate at speed and scale.

Private DJED on Cardano (via COTI’s privacy layer)

COTI will also launch a confidential version of DJED on Cardano that will leverage COTI’s privacy-on-demand capabilities. This gives users access to COTI’s comprehensive privacy features without leaving the native Cardano chain.

As it stands, Cardano is the home of DJED’s native stable asset infrastructure, but Private DJED will ensure that this foundation is ready for the next wave of adoption. COTI’s programmable privacy will mean users can decide when, how, and with whom sensitive transaction data is shared.

Users will be able to:

  • Send and receive DJED privately
  • Ensure transaction details such as amounts and wallet addresses are known only to selected parties
  • Remain compliant while preserving on-chain privacy
Private DJED Goes Multi-Chain on Midnight

In addition, COTI will also deploy a wrapped version of Private DJED on Midnight, the privacy-focused sidechain developed for Cardano. Midnight’s confidential smart contracts make it a great home for privacy-first applications. By introducing a stable, compliant, and privacy-preserving asset, COTI can help the Midnight ecosystem to serve its users secure, shielded stablecoin transfers, ideal for institutions, enterprises, and privacy-conscious users.

Midnight is also designed for interoperability. As a purpose-built sidechain within the Cardano ecosystem, it supports interaction with multiple blockchains such as Solana, XRP, and Avalanche. Through the deployment of Private DJED, COTI is transforming DJED from a single-chain stablecoin, facilitating private stablecoin flows through Midnight’s multi-chain user base, and creating a hub for cross-chain stablecoin activity.

Why It Matters

DJED will be the first stablecoin with native privacy support across multiple chains and privacy layers, whilst providing the foundation for both open and private finance. But this isn’t just about infrastructure, it’s also about ecosystem expansion. Cardano has an estimated 1 million active users and hundreds of projects building on it, and Midnight has an even bigger reach of an estimated 12–18 million users from eight different blockchains. DJED is arguably the first privacy stablecoin with serious institutional and cross-chain potential, and COTI is the privacy layer that connects them all.

The Future Is Private, Programmable, and Open.

Whether you’re a developer looking to integrate a stablecoin into your dApp or a user who values financial privacy, DJED is here for you.

The code is opening. The shield is activating.
The Future has Arrived.

title: COTI Treasury Goes Global: Now Available to U.S. Users!
summary: Starting today, U.S. users can access the COTI Treasury for the first time. This milestone expands participation to one of...
cleanedContent:
COTI Treasury Goes Global: Now Available to U.S. Users!

COTI | Aug 14, 2025

Starting today, U.S. users can access the COTI Treasury for the first time. This milestone expands participation to one of the world’s most important crypto markets and opens the door for the Treasury to reach its full potential.

The COTI Treasury enables users to participate in the COTI ecosystem, deposit $COTI from their own wallets, and receive $COTI rewards.

Crypto in the U.S. Is Blooming
  • The newly signed GENIUS Act establishes strong federal regulation for stablecoins, boosting transparency and market clarity.
  • An executive order has officially allowed 401(k) plans to include crypto and other alternatives, bringing digital assets into the retirement savings conversation.
  • Spot Bitcoin ETFs have seen record-breaking inflows, $14.8 billion by Q2 2025, signaling strong institutional trust and growing mainstream adoption.

COTI enabling Treasury access in the U.S. aligns perfectly with the market-wide optimism, putting users firmly in the driver’s seat.

How to Join In

If you’re new to the Treasury, here’s how to get started:

  • Follow the step-by-step guide here

Whether you’ve been part of the COTI community since day one or you’re just joining us now, the Treasury is designed to empower users with transparency, autonomy, and on-chain rewards as the COTI ecosystem grows.

Disclaimer: The COTI Treasury is a mechanism that allows eligible users to deposit $COTI and receive $COTI rewards. Participation is not an investment, does not create a profit-sharing arrangement, and rewards are variable and not guaranteed. No offers to buy or sell securities, commodities interests, or money transmission services are being made, and nothing herein should be construed as investment, financial, or trading advice. Users remain solely responsible for their own decisions and compliance with applicable laws. Use of the Treasury involves market volatility, smart-contract risk, and position liquidation risk (for multiplier selections).

title: COTI Joins CBDC Project as “Pioneer” of ECB’s Digital Euro
summary: As just announced by the European Central Bank, COTI will take part in the European Central Bank (ECB) project to...
cleanedContent:
COTI Joins CBDC Project as “Pioneer” of ECB’s Digital Euro

COTI | May 5, 2025

As just announced by the European Central Bank, COTI will take part in the European Central Bank (ECB) project to develop technology in support of the Digital Euro, a euro-wide CBDC. COTI is one of a number of selected Pioneer Partners comprising well-known organizations in the payments and technology space, including Accenture, KPMG, and TATA. This development follows COTI’s involvement in the Bank of Israel’s Digital Shekel trials, confirming continuing interest in COTI’s privacy technology by institutions as a solution for CBDCs.

CBDCs: A Major Use Case For Private Transactions

The ECB is targeting the beginning of 2026 for the Digital Euro launch. Between now and then, it will seek to select infrastructure providers. The ECB project provides the opportunity for participants to gain familiarity with the proposed Digital Euro interfaces. Pioneers will then work to demonstrate how a conditional payments system could be implemented on a technical level.

“Conditional payments” refers to the need for the provenance of assets to be verified before exchange. COTI’s signature technology, a privacy solution based on an on-chain implementation of Soda Labs’ Garbled Circuits, offers an ideal solution for ensuring the authenticity of real-world assets without revealing sensitive information at any point in the user journey. COTI will begin using simulated technical infrastructure for the Digital Euro, provided by the ECB, to test how its solution to conditional payments will work.

“Being invited to work with the ECB on such a consequential project is humbling, and a testament to the expertise and hard work of the COTI team. Privacy is a vital component for the future of Web3, ensuring users’ security and organizations’ compliance, and the same benefits apply to CBDCs. It’s critical that confidentiality is built into the core of these new systems, not merely added as an afterthought.” — Shahaf Bar-Geffen, COTI co-founder and CEO.

The ECB project will be COTI’s second CBDC project, after tackling the Digital Shekel Challenge for the Bank of Israel last year, where COTI developed a proof-of-concept for trustless transactions across borders and between different currencies via a decentralized marketplace. The system is designed to be powered by CBDCs and uses garbled circuits — a fast, lightweight approach to decentralized confidential computing (DeCC) — to maintain on-chain confidentiality between the different users involved.

The ECB is creating an innovation platform to collaborate with stakeholders, who will include large and small merchants, banks and other payment service providers, fintech companies, financial institutions, research institutes, technical experts, and universities.

At present, activities will focus on use cases in retail payments, particularly conditional payments, as the Bank prepares for the deployment of a Digital Euro. This would be a digital form of cash, complementing the use of coins and notes, and would be available to everyone within the euro area. As well as being secure and private, one of the benefits would be the ability to make payments across the $15 trillion euro-wide economy; at present, there is no digital payment option that covers the entire euro area.

We will provide updates as the initiative progresses, offering insights into the collaborative effort to shape the future of digital currency in the euro area.

Stay COTI!

title: A New Era of DeFi: PriveX is Now Live on COTI Mainnet
summary: We are thrilled to announce that PriveX, a new kind of perpetual decentralized exchange (Perp-DEX), is officially live on the...
cleanedContent:
A New Era of DeFi: PriveX is Now Live on COTI Mainnet

COTI | Jun 4, 2025

We are thrilled to announce that PriveX, a new kind of perpetual decentralized exchange (Perp-DEX), is officially live on the COTI Mainnet. PriveX brings together intent-based trading, autonomous trading AI agents, and on-chain privacy to radically reshape the trading experience for a new, evolving era of DeFAI users.

This architecture brings together three key advancements:

  • Intent-based execution: Drawing on deep CEX-like liquidity from a DEX
  • AI trading agents: For autonomous trading strategy executions
  • Private infrastructure: Protecting trader behavior and strategy from exploitation
Intent: A New Approach to Perp-DEXs

At the heart of PriveX is a shift away from traditional order book trading toward intent-based execution. Users send their intent to open a position, and the system handles execution by dynamically sourcing liquidity, opening the position, monitoring market conditions, and fulfilling the trade when conditions align. There’s no need to micromanage an order book, just set the intent, and PriveX does the rest.

Execution is handled by a backend ‘solver network’, powered by Symmio, that sources liquidity from a mix of centralized and decentralized venues, including Binance. This architecture eliminates reliance on static AMMs and fragmented liquidity, delivering:

  • More accurate pricing
  • Lower slippage
  • On-demand trade fulfillment
  • No idle capital locked in pools

This model is designed to scale efficiently, without the need for artificial incentives or inflationary emissions to attract liquidity providers.

COTI’s Privacy Protection for Strategic Advantage

By launching on COTI’s advanced privacy layer, PriveX offers users confidential trading infrastructure to keep transaction data encrypted until final settlement. Offering in-built privacy directly addresses long-standing issues in DeFi, including front-running, MEV bots, and exposed strategies.

PriveX levels the playing field by giving individual and institutional traders access to a more secure, efficient, and trustless market environment. This means that users’ trading intentions are private until execution, preventing malicious actors from exploiting trades and making it nearly impossible to front-run based on transaction timing alone. Execution logic stays concealed until finalized, ensuring fairness in trade execution, and orders are confidential to protect strategy.

Coming Soon — AI Trading Agents

PriveX will soon unveil its AI Trading Agents platform, allowing users to easily spin up agents to autonomously trade on their behalf, with the ability to train them on custom data sets. Each AI agent will control a vault, meaning that third parties can allocate funds and have their agent trade on their behalf based on its strategy.

Agents don’t just trade, though — they can post updates and information to social media, promoting themselves and their owners. Each agent will also be tokenized, turning proven performance into a tradable asset.

PriveX TGE

PriveX will be holding an airdrop of $PRVX, its native token, used to pay for agent execution, secure the network, incentivize contributors, and unlock access to exclusive features.

Try out PriveX today and start accruing ‘PriveX Points’ and ‘SYMM Points’, which will determine eligibility for the $PRVX Token Generation Event (TGE). To stay up to date, follow PriveX on X.

Stay COTI!

title: COTI Manifesto: Privacy Comes Next!
summary: The world is racing to digitise value, across borders, protocols, and systems. Open blockchains make this possible.
cleanedContent:
COTI Manifesto: Privacy Comes Next!

COTI | Jul 9, 2025

The world is racing to digitise value, across borders, protocols, and systems.
Open blockchains make this possible.

But with openness comes risk.
When everything is public by default, everything becomes exploitable by default. Innovation stalls, and entire sectors that serve billions of users stay on the sidelines.

We’ve seen the Bitcoin hype cycles come and go.
And all the while, adoption of blockchain by enterprises, governments, and institutions has stalled.

This is because blockchain has an infrastructure problem.
Privacy wasn’t built into public blockchains — and now, the cost of exposure is too high to ignore.

We know this because we have these conversations every day — with enterprises, institutions, and governments around the world.

This is why COTI exists: to solve this problem through on-chain privacy.

What comes next?
The answer is finally adoption.

And this is what we want to do at COTI.
We’re head down, building privacy infrastructure for this new era — for Privacy 2.0.

A new era of blockchain infrastructure:
Where data is protected.
Where logic runs privately in public.
Where sensitive data stays protected, but usable.

This is where builders, institutions, and ecosystems can finall, and fully, adopt blockchains.

COTI comes next.
Welcome to the new era.
